input:
As I noticed, you are in the Chicago time zone (CDT), while we are in Berlin (CET), which makes finding a suitable timeslot a bit challenging. However, I would like to propose a spontaneous meeting today at 8:00 AM (CDT).
If today's timeslot doesn't work for you, I am also available next Tuesday at the same time. Alternatively, you can have the call without me, which would also be fine. Our support team is available from Monday to Friday: 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM (CDT). Please suggest a timeslot that is convenient for you.
